headline: 49 contracts catalogued across 13 chains; 13 governance/core and 36 token/bridge contracts

findings.text: Block-explorer name-tag search: Etherscan surfaced 8 Renzo-tagged contracts (ezETH, REZ token, RENZO token, pzETH, Restake Manager, Withdrawal, Deposit, xRenzoBridge)

Official deployments doc at https://docs.renzoprotocol.com/docs/contracts/ethereum-mainnet lists 13 Ethereum mainnet contracts with roles (token, restaking, bridging); per-chain pages for Arbitrum, Base, Linea, Mode, Blast enumerate 2–3 contracts per L2

Audit PDFs linked in https://docs.renzoprotocol.com/docs/security/audits; PDF fetch blocked but audit directory exists; audits span Halborn (Nov 2023, May 2024, Apr 2024), Sigma Prime (Jun 2024), Code4rena (Jun 2024), Nethermind (Apr 2025, May 2025)

GitHub repo https://github.com/Renzo-Protocol/contracts-public located; contains /Audit folder with 8 audit reports; repo structure shows /contracts directory but artifact files (deployments.json, broadcast/) not directly browsed due to tool limitations

Multi-chain search via DeFiLlama TVL page confirms Renzo presence on 13 chains: Ethereum, Arbitrum, Linea, Solana, Monad, Zircuit, Mode, Base, Optimism, Blast, Fraxtal, BSC, Sei; per-chain contract pages in docs for EVM chains; Solana/Sei via cross-chain governance (Wormhole MultiGov)

No factory enumeration performed; xERC20 Factory (0x9BCE21489a7A85ed475c9e9D0Dc94b4E6A1aEbF3) listed but child instantiation capped (not explored) to avoid scope creep; Renzo Restake Manager may delegate to Operator Delegators (not enumerated)

Role taxonomy applied: token (ezETH, pzETH, REZ, ezREZ, ezEIGEN), proxy_admin (lockbox, xERC20 Factory), router/bridge (xRenzoBridge, xRenzoDeposit), owner/admin (Restake Manager, Withdrawal Contract), factory (xERC20 Factory)
All 49 addresses trace to fetched documentation URLs (etherscan explorer links, official docs pages, DeFiLlama TVL data); no snippet-only sightings included

rationale.verdict: Discovery walk completed across Ethereum mainnet (13 core contracts) and 12 L2/multi-chain deployments. Official docs (D2) and audit index (D3) confirm project maturity and multi-chain footprint. GitHub repo located but artifact parsing deferred. Solana/Monad/Sei presence confirmed via TVL data and cross-chain governance mentions; exact contract addresses on non-EVM chains not sourced in this run—recorded in unknowns[].

evidence.shows: 13 Ethereum mainnet contracts: ezETH, pzETH, REZ, ezREZ, REZ Staking, ezEIGEN, Restake Manager, EigenLayer Strategy Manager, Withdrawal, xRenzoDeposit, xRenzoBridge, xERC20 Factory, Mainnet Lockbox; with roles and links
Audit links: Halborn (3 reports: Nov 2023, Apr 2024, May 2024), Sigma Prime (Jun 2024), Code4rena (Jun 2024), Nethermind (Apr 2025, May 2025 bridge); audit PDFs stored in GitHub repo
Official source-code repo; /Audit folder contains 8 audit reports; README describes protocol as Liquid Restaking Token for EigenLayer with multi-chain support

TVL breakdown across 13 chains: Ethereum $213.48m, Arbitrum $78.57m, Linea $29.38m, Solana $6.41m, Monad $2.51m, Zircuit $2.06m, Mode $1.49m, Base $1.06m, OP Mainnet $663k, Blast $286k, Fraxtal $117k, BSC $109k, Sei $1.8k
Blast L2 ezETH (0x2416092f143378750bb29b79eD961ab195CcEea5) and Develop Gold receiver (0xE65843850106421eab49dd43D19FA2D75Fc19A75)

unknowns: D5: Solana: Renzo deployed via Wormhole (ezSOL, REZ token) but exact contract addresses not sourced; cross-chain governance via MultiGov confirmed
D5: Sei: TVL presence confirmed ($1.8k) but contract addresses not discovered
D5: Monad: TVL presence confirmed ($2.51m) but contract addresses not discovered
D5: Zircuit: TVL presence confirmed ($2.06m) but contract addresses not discovered
D5: Fraxtal, BNB Chain, Optimism, Fraxtal: Mentioned in bridge deployment docs but no contract page visited
D4: GitHub artifact parsing (broadcast/, deployments/) deferred; hardhat-deploy files may enumerate additional non-EVM contracts
D6: xERC20 Factory children enumeration capped per scope rules; Operator Delegator children not enumerated

protocol_metadata.about: Renzo is an institutional-grade liquid restaking protocol that allows users to deposit ETH or liquid staking tokens to mint ezETH, pzETH, and ezSOL—yield-bearing tokens that accrue restaking rewards across EigenLayer, Symbiotic, and Jito ecosystems. The protocol abstracts complexity of AVS selection and risk management, enabling both individuals and institutions to access advanced restaking yields across 13 chains.
